zigbee_init.message0: Initialize Zigbee device %1 role %2 device type %3 channel %4 PAN ID %5
zigbee_init.tooltip: Initialize Zigbee device, set role, device type, channel and PAN ID

zigbee_set_basic_info.message0: Set %1 basic info manufacturer %2 model %3 version %4
zigbee_set_basic_info.tooltip: Set Zigbee device basic information (manufacturer name, model and software version)

zigbee_set_install_code.tooltip: Set Zigbee device install code (for secure commissioning), format: hex string

zigbee_start.tooltip: Start Zigbee device, begin scanning and commissioning

zigbee_loop.tooltip: Call in loop() to handle Zigbee network communication and state maintenance

zigbee_is_joined.tooltip: Check if Zigbee device has successfully joined the network

zigbee_get_on_off.tooltip: Get current On/Off light switch state

zigbee_get_level.tooltip: Get current dimmable light brightness level

zigbee_set_color_hs.tooltip: Set color light hue (0-254) and saturation (0-254)

zigbee_set_color_temp.tooltip: Set extended color light color temperature (Mireds, 153=6500K cool, 500=2000K warm)

zigbee_set_battery.tooltip: Set battery status (voltage: decivolts; level: percentage 0-100)

zigbee_is_identifying.tooltip: Check if device is in Identify mode

zigbee_configure_reporting.message0: Configure %1 attribute reporting cluster %2 attribute ID %3 min interval %4 s max interval %5 s
zigbee_configure_reporting.tooltip: Configure Zigbee attribute auto-reporting policy (min/max report interval)

zigbee_on_state_change.tooltip: Execute code when on/off state is changed via Zigbee network

zigbee_on_level_change.tooltip: Execute code when brightness is changed via Zigbee network

zigbee_on_color_change.tooltip: Execute code when color is changed via Zigbee network

zigbee_on_join.tooltip: Execute code when Zigbee device successfully joins the network

zigbee_persist_save.tooltip: Save current Zigbee network state to flash (commissioning info, keys, etc.), recoverable after power loss

zigbee_persist_clear.tooltip: Clear saved Zigbee network state from flash, device will need to rejoin after restart

zigbee_rejoin.tooltip: Attempt to securely rejoin the Zigbee network
